gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/367)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/367)
text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَرَأَيْتُ فِي مَنْزِلِهِ بُسُطاً وَ وَسَائِدَ وَ أَنْمَاطاً وَ مَرَافِقَ فَقُلْتُ مَا هَذَا فَقَالَ مَتَاعُ الْمَرْأَةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Abu Malik Al Juhuny, from Abdullah Bin Ata’a who said,

‘I went over to Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, so I saw in his<sup>asws</sup> house, rugs, and pillows, and patterns, and amenities’. So I said, ‘What is this?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Belongings of the wife’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from his father from ‘ Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah from abu Malik al-Juhaniy from ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Ata’ who has said the following: “I once visited abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and in his house I saw spreading, cushions, furnishings and pillows and I asked, ‘What are these?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘These are the belongings of the woman (wife the Imam).’”
